# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: multi-stage-deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: Target environment
        type: choice
        required: true
        options:
          - dev
          - staging
          - prod
        default: dev
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}-${{ github.event.inputs.environment || 'dev' }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set artifact metadata
        id: meta
        run: echo "artifact_name=${ARTIFACT_NAME}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist
          if [ -x "./scripts/build.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/build.sh
          else
            echo "No build script found; creating placeholder artifact."
            echo "build $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" > dist/build.txt
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: |
            dist/**
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 14

  deploy_dev:
    name: Deploy (dev)
    needs: build
    if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.environment == 'dev') || (github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: dev
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Deploy to dev
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy-dev.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          if [ -x "./scripts/deploy-dev.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy-dev.sh ./artifacts
          elif [ -x "./scripts/deploy.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy.sh dev ./artifacts
          else
            echo "No deployment script found."
            exit 1
          fi

  deploy_staging:
    name: Deploy (staging)
    needs: build
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.environment == 'staging' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: staging
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Deploy to staging
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy-staging.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          if [ -x "./scripts/deploy-staging.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy-staging.sh ./artifacts
          elif [ -x "./scripts/deploy.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy.sh staging ./artifacts
          else
            echo "No deployment script found."
            exit 1
          fi

  deploy_prod:
    name: Deploy (prod)
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy_staging
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.environment == 'prod' }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: prod
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Deploy to prod
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy-prod.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          if [ -x "./scripts/deploy-prod.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy-prod.sh ./artifacts
          elif [ -x "./scripts/deploy.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/deploy.sh prod ./artifacts
          else
            echo "No deployment script found."
            exit 1
          fi
